channel.title: Pages on Geoff Dixon > Write-Verbose
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on Geoff Dixon > Write-Verbose

item.title: About
item.description: Hey! I’m Geoff Dixon. I live in the U.K. and work remotely on technology projects for large enterprises. I’ve been self-employed for many years, working as an I.T. consultant, mainly in the financial sector. I started programming as a teenager in the 80’s on a BBC Micro. These days I mainly use .NET and write a lot of PowerShell. Disclaimers: All views expressed are soley my own Product reviews are based on real experience Scripts and guides should be implemented in a test environment before production Posts are a point in time and should be verified against latest product changes
